description: K36-A5J1: Verified-safe warning suppressions for clean export. Each entry is a path+ruleId pair that has been manually reviewed and confirmed to contain no real sensitive data. Used with guard --allowlist to achieve strict PASS.

allowedWarnings.reason: 3-line CSV: 1 header + 2 synthetic class rows (测试专业2026级甲班, 测试专业2026级乙班). No real class names.
4-line CSV: 1 header + 3 synthetic room rows (SYN-R101, SYN-R102, SYN-LAB01). No real room data.
Design spec for soft constraint SC5 (teacher day balance). Contains constraint parameters, not real teacher names. 0 Chinese surname matches.
Markdown version of constraint design spec. No real teacher data.
Read-only design audit for SC5 constraint. Phase name only, no real teacher data.
Markdown version of design audit. No real teacher data.
TypeScript audit script. Contains score constraint design docs, no real teacher names or paths. Uses synthetic test fixtures.
Python utility for cleaning teacher names from contact files. Processes input from command-line args; contains no hardcoded real names, phone numbers, or file paths.
TypeScript diagnostic that queries Prisma DB for suspicious teacher names. Contains only keyword filters (班, 合班, etc.) and regex patterns; no real teacher data.
Synthetic fixture: 3 placeholder names (测试教师甲/乙/丙). Explicitly marked synthetic.
TypeScript verify script for SC5 constraint. Uses synthetic test data; no real teacher names.
Standard Next.js API route. Reads from Prisma DB at runtime; contains no hardcoded data. 'teacher' is the entity name, not a data disclosure.
